youtube.title: SAP’s 200 AI Agents Will Run Your Company — No Humans Needed 😱
youtube.description:
SAP just dropped something wild at Sapphire 2026.

200 AI agents that handle finance, HR, supply chain, vendor payments — all without waiting for a human to approve anything. They call it the Autonomous Enterprise.

A purchase order comes in at 2am. AI checks inventory, approves it, pays the vendor. Done before you wake up. What used to take your ops team 3 days now takes 4 minutes.

It runs on Claude 4, with Anthropic, Google Cloud, Microsoft, and NVIDIA backing the infrastructure. SAP’s CEO said “almost right isn’t good enough” for mission-critical processes — so they trained these agents on decades of enterprise data.

Companies are already cutting middle management roles to fund this shift. If you run operations, procurement, or finance — this is the thing that replaces the approval chain above you.

Comment ENTERPRISE and I’ll send you the full breakdown.
